## Thank you for your interest in MyReps.info

MyReps.info is a read-only reference site. All data is pulled automatically from official government APIs (Congress.gov, OpenStates) and is not manually curated or editable by contributors.

**Pull requests are not accepted.** This PR will be closed without review.

If you believe a data error exists, it originates from one of our upstream sources. Please report it directly to:
- Federal data: [api.congress.gov](https://api.congress.gov)
- State data: [openstates.org](https://openstates.org)
